title: Repository of dropdown/label standards
excerpt: Need the ability to create a repository of standard options in dropdowns and labels that can be reused across boards within a workspace. Universal starting ones are great but there are times where you need to indicate th…

posts.author: smarker (Sarah Marker)
posts.cookedHtml: Need the ability to create a repository of standard options in dropdowns and labels that can be reused across boards within a workspace. Universal starting ones are great but there are times where you need to indicate the same thing on multiple boards that isn’t progress but groupings. Build it once, use it multiple times.
